rulings.Case Title: JUANA LAPITAN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for apportionment proceeding and for an order to distribute settlement funds is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE EGGLETON et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Release Of Decedent'S Pathology Material For Tissue Digestion Analysis
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America¿s motion to compel release of decedent¿s pathology material for tissue digestion analysis is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Eaton Corporation, As Sii To Cutler-Hammer, Inc.'S Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Written Discovery, Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted, And Requests For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Eaton Corp.¿s further responses to written discovery, to deem requests admitted and for sanctions is denied. The motion was filed after the 45 day period provided for filing such motions. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Goodrich Corporation; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, November 4, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of the PMQ and custodian or records of Goodrich Corp and request for sanctions is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)
